objective: Continue data acquisition under the current Tushare permission profile where only stock raw daily bars are reliably available.
forbidden_actions: Do not call endpoints that are known to be permission-blocked.
Do not infer adjusted returns without adj_factor.
Do not infer valuation or market-cap factors without daily_basic.
Do not treat current stock_basic snapshots as historical PIT universe.
Do not run factor validation or portfolio backtests in this task.
acceptance: Only Tushare daily endpoint is called when execution is enabled.
Blocked endpoints are recorded as permission_blocked instead of retried.
Raw daily files are written by trade_date and can be resumed without re-calling cached dates.
Quality report checks duplicate asset-date rows and essential OHLCV fields.
Reports clearly state that data is raw-price only and not sufficient for adjusted-return, valuation, or index-constituent research.
